message:
perf(grid): add #[inline] to grid layout hot-path accessors (bd-154py)

Annotate 10 trivial accessor/constructor methods in grid.rs with
#[inline] to allow cross-crate inlining in rendering and layout loops:
GridArea::cell, GridArea::span, Grid::new, Grid::num_rows, Grid::num_cols,
GridLayout::cell, GridLayout::num_rows, GridLayout::num_cols,
GridLayout::row_height, GridLayout::col_width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
